About.description: Al Fattah Matrimony was founded on the principles of Islamic ethics and community trust. We simplify the journey of finding 'half your deen' while ensuring 100% privacy for every member.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.heading: Preserving Values in a Digital Age
mission.description: In a world of fast-paced connections, Al Fattah Matrimony stands for depth and sincerity. We believe that finding a life partner is a sacred journey that requires patience, respect, and a commitment to shared values.
mission.item1: Manual profile screening by community experts
mission.item2: Strict adherence to Islamic matrimonial ethics

community.title: Our Community
community.heading: A Trusted Space for Tamil Muslims
community.description: We are more than just a website; we are a community-driven initiative. Our platform is specifically tailored to the cultural and linguistic nuances of the Tamil Muslim community worldwide, ensuring you feel at home while searching for your partner.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.heading: The Future of Halal Matchmaking
vision.description: Our vision is to become the most trusted global platform for Halal matchmaking, leveraging modern technology while staying rooted in our timeless traditions. We aim to make the path to Nikkah accessible, safe, and blessed for everyone.

hero.heading: Find the <sukoon>Sukoon</sukoon> Your Heart Deserves.
hero.description: Al Fattah Nikkah simplifies the journey to completing half your deen with 100% privacy and verified Tamil Muslim profiles.

services.heading: Services for your Halal Journey.

blessedPath.heading: Walk the Blessed <sukoon>Path to Nikkah.</sukoon>

membership.heading: Membership Plans

successStories.heading: Hearts United by Allah
successStories.quote: Finding a partner who shares the same cultural and religious values was hard until I found Al Fattah. Alhamdulillah, we are now happily married.
